An attacker can supply a malicious PDF that causes the process to hang indefinitely, consuming 100% CPU and making the application unresponsive.

### Patches
Patched version: 12.2.0.

PdfParser (introduced in Pillow 4.2.0) follows Prev pointers in PDF trailers to read cross-reference sections. If a
trailer's Prev pointer references an offset that has already been processed — either pointing to itself or forming a
longer cycle — the parser enters an infinite loop. Pillow now tracks previously processed trailer offsets and raises an
error if a cycle is detected.

### Workarounds
Use any version but the affected versions: >= 4.2.0, < 12.2.0

### Resources
 - Fix: https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/pull/9519", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00126, "percentile": 0.02588}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r73j-pqj5-w3x7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T20:19:30Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r73j-pqj5-w3x7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r73j-pqj5-w3x7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42310"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-09T06:16:10Z", "published_at": "2026-05-04T20:19:30Z", "references": ["https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/security/advisories/GHSA-r73j-pqj5-w3x7", "https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/pull/9519", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42310", "https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/commit/3bf614e4b8615d0ce1d5039efaf6db447fe7c468", "https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/releases/tag/12.2.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r73j-pqj5-w3x7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/python-pillow/Pillow/security-advisories/GHSA-r73j-pqj5-w3x7", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow", "summary": "Pillow has a PDF Parsing Trailer Infinite Loop (DoS)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T13:41:24Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r73j-pqj5-w3x7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "12.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pillow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.2.0, < 12.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Pillow has a PDF Parsing Trailer Infinite Loop (DoS)
